key_metrics: Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EBITDA margin
new_risks: Potential elimination of the de minimis exemption for commercial goods imported into the United States
Continued pressure on levels of consumer discretionary product spending
Impairment charges for goodwill and other long-lived tangible and intangible assets
management_tone: Cautious; management heavily emphasizes ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty, inflation, and continued pressure on consumer discretionary spending.
analyst_note: Etsy achieved modest top-line growth of 2.4% YoY to $678M in Q3 2025, but faces significant overhangs from consumer discretionary softness and potential regulatory headwinds regarding cross-border trade exemptions.
